race.comment: BASSETT HOUND (2) has had no luck in his racing career thus far but has shown good ability in defeat, jumping an odds on chance before the break. Drawn wide again, so he's likely to get back in the run but watch for him flying late in the race. BLATANT VIOLATION (5) is on debut for the Dan and Ben Pearce yard and will be fitter for one trial coming into this. The booking of Pike is a big push for his chances and he should get every chance from the draw. Can play a role. MY DANNY BOY (3) missed on debut at Pinjarra when sitting on the speed throughout. His latest trial was strong and he'll be hard to hold out if he gets some luck from the draw. HIMIZU (8) was strong fresh and can be in this for a long way.
